resources.string: Choose where future automatic export emails should go. If blank, Hopply falls back to your signed-in account email.
Sign in with a permanent account to configure automatic export delivery. Manual share still works.
Leave blank to use your signed-in account email when available.
Attachments require an internet connection and a permanent (non-anonymous) account. Your aircraft, logs, tasks, technicians and license info sync automatically.
You're using the app anonymously. All data stays on this device. Sign in with a permanent account on the previous screen to back things up.
Your work stays on this device. Reinstalling the app or moving to a new phone will not bring this data with you.
Changes you make here sync to the cloud and any other device signed in to the same account.
Authentication expired. Sign in again to resume sync.
Could not upload the latest local changes. Sync will retry when possible.
Local edits won't reach the cloud. Re-enable above to resume backups.
Recent changes have been pushed and any remote updates are applied.
Sign in to enable cloud sync.
Backed up to your account across devices.
Your data stays on this device only.
Attachments upload over Wi-Fi and cellular.
